title: Reporting Options
excerpt:
Has anybody figured out a good solution to show project velocity over time?  We manage complex compliance projects on Monday and love the platform for the most part, but we keep running into trouble with reporting. 
Idea…

posts.author: NickGT (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anybody figured out a good solution to show project velocity over time? We manage complex compliance projects on Monday and love the platform for the most part, but we keep running into trouble with reporting.

Ideally, we’d be able to show a burndown chart with the Y-axis showing “Hours Estimated” and the X-axis showing time divisions (days/weeks) with the deadline at the lower right of the chart. And then a trendline that shows if we’re on schedule, ahead of schedule, or behind schedule. Is this something anybody has run into before? We’ve added several marketplace addons for burndown charts, etc. but haven’t found a good solution.

Please forgive my doodle quality

Screen Shot 2021-12-20 at 8.40.43 AM1212×770 47.5 KB
